name: Meetup
description: Meetup GraphQL API - search events and groups, manage events, RSVPs, and community groups

tools.name: self
tools.description: Get the authenticated user's Meetup profile including name, email, location, bio, and member photo.

tools.name: search_events
tools.description: Search for Meetup events by keyword and optional location. Pass a filter object with query (required string), and optionally lat (number), lon (number), radius (integer miles), startDateRange (ISO8601), endDateRange (ISO8601). Example: {"query": "tech meetups", "lat": 40.71, "lon": -74.01, "radius": 25}. Returns up to 20 events.

filter.description: Search filter. Required: query (string). Optional: lat (number), lon (number), radius (integer miles), startDateRange (ISO8601), endDateRange (ISO8601)

tools.name: search_groups
tools.description: Search for Meetup groups by keyword and optional location. Pass a filter object with query (required string), and optionally lat (number), lon (number), radius (integer miles). Example: {"query": "python developers", "lat": 51.51, "lon": -0.13}. Returns up to 20 groups.

filter.description: Search filter. Required: query (string). Optional: lat (number), lon (number), radius (integer miles)

tools.name: get_event
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific Meetup event by its ID. Returns title, full description, date/time, venue, group, host, RSVP settings, fees, and images.

tools.name: get_group
tools.description: Get detailed information about a Meetup group by its URL name (e.g., 'ReactNYC'). Returns name, description, location, member count, topics, organizer, and photos.

tools.name: group_upcoming_events
tools.description: List upcoming events for a Meetup group. Returns up to 20 upcoming events with title, date, venue, and RSVP count.

tools.name: group_past_events
tools.description: List past events for a Meetup group. Returns up to 20 past events with title, date, venue, and attendance count.

tools.name: create_event
tools.description: Create a new Meetup event. Pass an input object with required fields: groupUrlname (string), title (string), description (string, HTML allowed), startDateTime (ISO8601), duration (ISO8601 duration like 'PT2H'). Optional: endDateTime, venueId, eventType ('PHYSICAL'/'ONLINE'), publishStatus ('DRAFT'/'PUBLISHED'), rsvpSettings ({rsvpLimit, guestsAllowed}), question (RSVP question).

input.description: CreateEventInput. Required: groupUrlname, title, description, startDateTime, duration (e.g., PT2H). Optional: endDateTime, venueId, eventType, publishStatus, rsvpSettings, question

tools.name: edit_event
tools.description: Edit an existing Meetup event. Pass an input object with eventId (required) and fields to update: title, description, startDateTime, duration, endDateTime, venueId, eventType ('PHYSICAL'/'ONLINE'), publishStatus ('DRAFT'/'PUBLISHED'/'CANCELLED'), rsvpSettings.

input.description: EditEventInput. Required: eventId. Optional: title, description, startDateTime, duration, endDateTime, venueId, eventType, publishStatus, rsvpSettings

tools.name: cancel_event
tools.description: Cancel a Meetup event. This sets the event status to CANCELLED, notifies attendees, and cannot be undone.

tools.name: event_attendees
tools.description: Get the list of RSVPs/attendees for a Meetup event. Returns attendee names, RSVP status, guest count, and timestamps.

tools.name: find_location
tools.description: Search for location suggestions by name or address. Returns city, state, country, latitude, and longitude. Useful for finding coordinates to use in event search filters.
